title.en: However, the Gate of Heaven is so requested, an...

content.en:
As a fourfold heavenly gate force, the recruitment requirements of the Voidless Heavenly Gate are also very strict, each realm has its own enrollment standards for each realm, and the enrollment requirements of a triple ancestor like Ye Tian are even stricter to the point of perversion.

First of all, the Triple Ancestor must comprehend the Nine Extreme Extremes, and secondly, he must pass through the seventh layer of the Voidless Hall of the Voidless Heavenly Gate, and if these two conditions are met, he can join the Voidless Heavenly Gate.

However, it is too difficult to comprehend the Nine Extreme Extremes, and this requirement directly brushes down the Triple Ancestors, such as comprehending the Nine Extreme Extremes, there is hope to impact the Quadruple Ancestors in the future, and there is really no need to join the Quadruple Heavenly Gate!

However, the Gate of Heaven is so requested, and love does not come.

......

No airspace.

This is one of the great domains of the Shangling Primordial Domain, and it is also the place where the Voidless Heavenly Gate is located, and all of this place is under the management of the Voidless Heavenly Gate.

When Ye Tian came to the Voidless Domain, he found that the area of this Great Domain was very large, equivalent to one-tenth of the size of the end of the realm, and the heaven and earth were filled with the aura of the Extreme Dao, which was even better than the cultivation environment of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the Voidless City without Void, which was the test site for joining the Voidless Heaven Gate.

The scale of the Voidless City is not as large as the True Ape Giant City, after all, the True Ape Giant City is one of the entrances to the Upper Spirit Origin Domain from the Primordial Black Sea, which is why it is so important, and there are many original ancestors gathered.

In Wukong City, there are not so many original ancestors, and most of them are still ordinary perfect controllers.

"Hey, there are not many Extreme Dao Ancestor Owners here, and they are the same as my previous ones. "

Ye Tian muttered.

He had also used his copying talent to probe in the True Ape Giant City before, but after getting rid of the duplicate Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu, he only copied six Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu, which took a long time to copy!

Therefore, even if you come to the Shangling Origin Domain and want to copy the new Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu, you have to spend time looking for it slowly, and you can't copy a few Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the place where the Heavenly Gate of Wukong participated in the test.

Here, many people are signing up for the assessment, but Ye Tian came to sign up as a triple ancestor, which still attracted the attention of many original ancestors!

After all, the Triple Ancestor wants to join the Voidless Heavenly Gate, and the requirements are too harsh!

"This Primordial Ancestor, you want to join my Voidless Heavenly Gate?"

A Triple Origin Ancestor appeared and looked at Ye Tian.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

"First of all, you must comprehend the Nine Extreme Extremes, otherwise it will be a waste of my time. The Triple Ancestor said.

"Naturally, I have comprehended!" Ye Tian said.

"Then come with me!"

This Triple Ancestor took Ye Tian into a piece of time and space.

"Please show the ultimate path of your comprehension!"

The Triple Ancestor said.

Ye Tian is going to join the Voidless Heavenly Gate in a high-profile manner this time, so he will be taken seriously, so he decided to show more extreme poles, anyway, he is copying his body, what are he afraid of attracting people's attention.

He had to attract the attention of the upper echelons of the Voidless Heavenly Gate before he could join the Void Fang Holy Gate.

Buzz Buzz !!!

A variety of extreme power diffused from Ye Tianse's body.

Nine kinds!

Fifteen!

Twenty kinds!

......

More and more extreme extremes are being revealed.

At first, the Triple Ancestor of the Voidless Heavenly Gate was relatively calm, but when he saw Ye Tian display the power of more than twenty extreme extreme paths, he was directly shocked.

"This ......"

He immediately informed the Fourfold Ancestors of the Voidless Heavenly Gate.

Tear !!!

Time and space cracked, and a fourfold ancestor appeared.

At this moment, Ye Tian saw the Quadruple Ancestor for the first time.

Each of these fourfold ancestors has an Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment, and some even have more than one Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment.

"Guya, is that him?"

A Quadruple Ancestor asked.

"Elders, this is the Triple Primordial Ancestor, and he has displayed a total of 29 Extreme Extreme Paths before and after!! "Guya Primordial Ancestor said.

"You really comprehended the 29 Extreme Extremes?"

The other Quadruple Ancestor asked in disbelief.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian once again showed the 29 extreme extremes he had comprehended, and this time these fourfold ancestors were dumbfounded one by one, and they really believed it.

"What's your name?" asked a Quadruple Ancestor.

"Endless Ancestor!"

Ye Tian introduced himself.

In the Shanglin Plain Domain, the original ancestor was used as the title, so Ye Tian came here, so he naturally had to adapt to the title here.

"Endless Ancestor, you don't need to participate in other assessments, just join our Voidless Heavenly Gate, I know that a demon like you joined the Voidless Heavenly Gate in order to join the Void Tooth Holy Gate. The next time the Void Tooth Holy Gate recruits disciples, we can recommend you there, how about it?" said a fourfold ancestor.

"I'm willing to join the Voidless Heavenly Gate!"

Ye Tian agreed.

In this way, Ye Tian easily joined the Voidless Heavenly Gate.

......

There is no empty heaven gate.

Ye Tian came here, and directly became a core disciple of the Voidless Heavenly Gate.

If he had to conceal Ye Tian's situation, otherwise the Fourfold Ancestors of the Void Heavenly Gate would have to directly give him the identity of Daozi.

However, with such a talent as him, he will inevitably join the Void Tooth Holy Gate in the future, so he can be given a core disciple status for the time being, but in terms of treatment, he must find a way to give it.

After joining the Voidless Heavenly Gate, Ye Tian did not practice in retreat directly, but often went in and out of the Tibetan Scripture Pavilion to browse this kind of classics and learn more about the secrets of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain and the information of cultivation.

After all, Ye Tian had only obtained information from the Boundless Lord of the Boundless Cultivation Materials above the Triple Ancestor, but the Boundless Lord himself was very weak, so he didn't have much cultivation experience to understand.

Therefore, he needs to understand the following cultivation materials as soon as possible.

"Sure enough, the Triple Ancestor had the best practice of systematic inscriptions, and only casual cultivation practiced individual inscriptions one after another, just like the Void Inscription of the Unbounded Lord, which was an unsystematic inscription. No, it should be said that the mutilated inscription. Ye Tian muttered.

And the Voidless Heavenly Gate has a lot of systematic inscriptions, such as the inscription technique containing the nine extreme extremes - the Nine Star Diagram, if you only want to break through with the nine extreme paths, the Nine Star Diagram is undoubtedly the most suitable system inscription technique for the Triple Ancestor.

There is also an inscription technique containing eighteen extreme extremes - eighteen golden body techniques!

and the inscription technique containing the thirty-six extreme extremes - the Voidless True Body Technique!

And Ye Tian was also constantly inquiring about the information, trying to understand the original Zhou Tian map of his three hundred and sixty-five black characters.

He also really found the information of the original Zhou Tiantu.
